tools.name: Jira
tools.source: Direct access — 141 projects, 313 boards
tools.notes: Universal work system — engineering, CS, operations, governance all run through Jira

tools.name: Confluence
tools.source: Direct access — 165 spaces, 14,111+ pages indexed
tools.notes: Active documentation culture. Bundled with Jira licensing.

tools.name: Bitbucket Cloud
tools.source: Direct access — 4 workspaces, 3,191 repos
tools.notes: Four separate workspaces (madmobile, syscolabs, madpayments, syscolabsconf). Bundled with Atlassian.

tools.name: AWS
tools.source: SSO access — 18 accounts, ~$383K/month
tools.notes: Multi-account org with ControlTower governance

tools.name: Grafana (self-hosted)
tools.source: AWS inventory — Shared Services EKS cluster with Mimir/Loki/Tempo S3 buckets
tools.notes: Self-hosted on EKS. Mimir (metrics), Loki (logs), Tempo (traces). Separate instance for Payments.

tools.name: Jenkins
tools.source: AWS inventory — Jenkins EC2 instances in CAKE Development account
tools.notes: Used for CAKE/restaurant CI/CD. EC2-hosted. Confluence doc: 'Legacy Jenkins CI/CD Automation'

tools.name: Bitbucket Pipelines
tools.source: Bitbucket inventory — pipeline configs in repos, 87% coverage in madpayments
tools.notes: Used for Retail and Payments CI/CD. Included in Bitbucket licensing but build minutes may be separate.

tools.name: Terraform
tools.source: AWS inventory — state buckets across multiple accounts
tools.notes: IaC standard. Check if using OSS or Terraform Cloud/Enterprise (licensing implications).

tools.name: Cursor
tools.source: Bitbucket — .cursor/rules in 2 repos. Confluence — 'Design Integration with Cursor', 'API Automation using Cursor', 'Agentic Lovable Dev Flow'. Restaurant Update deck mentions heavy Cursor use.
tools.notes: Per-seat subscription ($20-40/month/seat). Unknown how many seats. Key interview question.

tools.name: Claude / Anthropic
tools.source: Bitbucket — CLAUDE.md in 3 madpayments repos (devices-idtech-neo, vp3350, cybersource-bin-service)
tools.notes: Payments team using Claude for development. API costs or via Cursor integration?

tools.name: Wiz.io
tools.source: AWS inventory — CloudFormation stacks for Wiz deployment across accounts
tools.notes: CSPM/CWPP. Enterprise SaaS pricing — typically significant annual contract.

tools.name: AWS GuardDuty
tools.source: AWS inventory — active across all 18 accounts
tools.notes: Usage-based pricing within AWS bill

tools.name: AWS Security Hub
tools.source: AWS inventory — enabled in CAKE R&D ($11/month)
tools.notes: May not be enabled across all accounts

tools.name: SageMaker
tools.source: AWS AI scan — 9 notebooks in CAKE Dev, 2 in R&D, 1 Studio domain, 31 AI-related S3 buckets
tools.notes: Active ML infrastructure. Notebooks suggest data science experimentation.

tools.name: AWS Bedrock
tools.source: AWS AI scan — accessible in CAKE Dev, R&D, and Mgmt accounts. IAM cleanup Lambda exists in Mgmt.
tools.notes: LLM API access. Usage-based pricing. Check if this is where Neo/AI platform connects.

tools.name: Snyk
tools.source: AWS inventory — Snyk-related Lambda in CAKE R&D
tools.notes: Developer security platform. Per-developer or per-repo pricing.

tools.name: Guru
tools.source: Restaurant Update deck mentions AI-produced documentation via Guru. Access not confirmed.
tools.notes: Per-user pricing. May overlap with Confluence.

tools.name: Microsoft Teams
tools.source: Direct access — active, multiple channels including system monitoring alerts
tools.notes: Part of Microsoft 365 licensing

tools.name: Microsoft Forms
tools.source: Direct use — Adam building surveys in MS Forms on MM account
tools.notes: Part of Microsoft 365 licensing

tools.name: Keycloak
tools.source: AWS inventory — Keycloak EC2 instance in CAKE Dev. Confluence — Keycloak VA assessment.
tools.notes: Self-hosted identity provider. Open source.

tools.name: Neo4j
tools.source: AWS inventory — neo4j EC2 instance in CAKE Development
tools.notes: Graph database. Community vs Enterprise edition unclear.

tools.name: Kafka
tools.source: AWS inventory — Kafka EC2 instances in CAKE Development data platform
tools.notes: Self-hosted on EC2. Check if using Confluent (paid) or Apache Kafka (OSS).

tools.name: Elasticsearch
tools.source: AWS inventory — Elasticsearch EC2 instances in CAKE Development data platform
tools.notes: Self-hosted. Check if OSS or Elastic subscription.

tools.name: Backstage / TechDocs
tools.source: AWS inventory — mm-techdocs-storage S3 bucket in Shared Artifact Registry
tools.notes: Developer portal. If in use, indicates dev experience investment.

tools.name: n8n
tools.source: Confluence — 'AI ETL Workflows - n8n' in Concierge Team and Mad Mobile Architecture spaces
tools.notes: Workflow automation. Self-hosted or cloud. Used for AI ETL workflows.

tools.name: Amazon MQ (RabbitMQ)
tools.source: AWS inventory — $3,289/month in Retail Prod US. Largest single line item in that account.
tools.notes: Managed RabbitMQ. Potential modernization opportunity.

tools.name: AWS CodeArtifact
tools.source: AWS inventory — Shared Artifact Registry account. Confluence — NPM and Maven CodeArtifact docs.
tools.notes: Centralized package registry for NPM and Maven artifacts

tools.name: Figma
tools.source: Restaurant Update deck mentions 'Figma for design assets'
tools.notes: Per-seat design tool. Used by product design team.
